mapper.select: select count(1) from post where id = #{postId} and status = 1
mapper.update: update post set like_count = like_count + 1, update_at = now() where id = #{postId} and status = 1
update post set like_count = case when like_count > 0 then like_count - 1 else 0 end, update_at = now() where id = #{postId} and status = 1
